variants: Matteo Fortebraccio is a notable architect specializing in Sustainable Architecture, celebrated for his impactful publication, Candlewick Signal Lattice. He was honored with the Skygate Distinction, recognizing his innovative approach to eco-friendly design. An active member of the Knights of Slipstream, Matteo collaborates with peers who are equally dedicated to sustainable practices. His academic foundation was significantly shaped under the mentorship of Chadwick Drury, whose guidance played a crucial role in his professional growth.
